underlying_goal: Diagnose a CPU spike/crash incident on Hetzner VPS, fix the root cause, and document/propagate the lessons learned across affected services and repos
brief_summary: User wanted to diagnose a Hetzner VPS crash incident and prevent recurrence; Claude identified an OOM crash-loop (not Hetzner throttling), implemented systemd StartLimitBurst and MemoryMax/CPUQuota safeguards, propagated changes to relevant repos, and documented the lesson in a new GitHub repo.
